overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a historic stone temple complex. The player walks along a narrow water canal, turns at a flooded dead end, and approaches a large ornate door guarded by an NPC. The environment features classical stone architecture with tall fluted columns and autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone walkway alongside a water canal

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow stone pathway beside the water canal with lily pads

entered.detail: gray stone tile pathway running alongside the water canal
narrow water channel with green murky water and white lily pads
rectangular stone structure resembling a sarcophagus or ceremonial bench
tall gray stone block wall with vertical architectural details
series of tall stone columns visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow stone walkway flanked by tall stone walls, with a water canal containing lily pads on the right side. The path features stone sarcophagus-like benches and leads toward a series of tall stone pillars in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dead end of the water canal with submerged pathway

events.description: character reaches the flooded dead end and begins turning around to return

agents.ego_description: reaching the submerged dead end of the path and turning around to face back toward the entrance

entered.detail: stone pathway continuing underwater to a stone wall dead end

segments.scene_description: Standing at the flooded dead end where the stone pathway submerges into the water. The character turns around 180 degrees, causing the water canal to shift from the right side to directly ahead, then begins walking back.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with cobblestone paving

events.description: exiting the narrow water corridor into the open temple courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking back up the path and entering the open courtyard with the temple building

entered.detail: cobblestone paved area replacing the stone tile pathway
large stone building with arched windows and green copper roof details
tree with yellow autumn foliage visible above the temple walls
series of tall fluted stone columns lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow corridor into an open cobblestone courtyard. A large temple building with arched windows rises on the left, while tall fluted stone columns line the right side. An autumn tree is visible above the walls, and the water canal recedes to the right background.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with large ornate door and stairs

events.description: ascending the stone stairs toward the large ornate door

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs toward the large ornate door, passing the guard on the left

notable_agents.action: guard standing stationary beside the stairs holding a spear

entered.detail: large arched metal door with intricate geometric patterns and metal studs
wide stone steps leading up to the temple entrance
metal torch sconces mounted on the wall beside the door

segments.scene_description: Approaching the temple entrance and ascending the stone stairs toward a large ornate metal door with intricate patterns. A guard stands stationary to the left holding a spear. Wall sconces flank the doorway, and the tall fluted columns now loom closer on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor that opens into a grand temple courtyard. It begins by gliding along a narrow walkway flanked by high walls and a lily-pad-filled canal, passing stone sarcophagus-like benches toward distant pillars. As the path reaches a flooded dead end, the camera pivots 180 degrees to retrace its steps, shifting the water canal to the center of the view. The scene then expands into an open cobblestone courtyard where a large temple building with arched windows rises on the left and autumn foliage peeks over the walls. Finally, the camera ascends stone stairs toward an ornate metal door, passing a stationary spear-wielding guard and towering fluted columns that loom closer as the entrance is reached.
